Primary warm light source emitting golden amber tones (2700K–3000K color temperature).  Gentle diffused lighting with smooth shadow transitions. Low contrast ratio preserving soft depth without harsh darkness. Warm highlights glowing softly on skin and surfaces.  Subtle practical light sources such as table lamps, candles, or string lights. Light pooling naturally in small areas, fading gradually into shadow. Soft rim lighting defining form without dramatic separation.  Rich warm color palette with hints of muted browns, creams, and soft oranges. Natural skin tones enhanced by warm illumination. Intimate atmosphere, relaxed mood, cinematic realism, high detail.

nodes.title: night scene- After rain
widgets_values: Transform into a romantic night scene after rain. Freshly washed atmosphere with crystal-clear air and subtle mist. Dark blue-black sky with soft diffused cloud cover.  Wet reflective surfaces glistening under warm streetlights. Golden light reflections stretching across rain-soaked pavement. Soft puddles mirroring lights and silhouettes with cinematic depth.  Gentle warm practical lighting (street lamps, window glow, distant café lights). Cool ambient night tones blending naturally with warm highlights. Low-contrast shadows softened by moisture in the air.  Subtle atmospheric haze enhancing depth and light diffusion. Specular highlights shimmering on wet ground and foliage. Soft rim lighting outlining figures against reflective surfaces.  Clean, fresh post-rain clarity with visible texture on surfaces. Intimate, slow, emotionally warm atmosphere. Cinematic realism, ultra-detailed reflections, high dynamic range, 8K quality

nodes.title: winter night
widgets_values: Transform into a deep winter night scene covered in fresh snow. Dark navy-blue sky with a visible full moon as the primary natural light source. Cool moonlight casting soft blue illumination across snow-covered ground and trees.  Low overall exposure, true nighttime darkness dominating most of the frame. Large areas of shadow with subtle detail barely visible. Snow reflecting faint silvery-blue highlights from the moon.  Warm golden light glowing from cabin windows or lanterns (2700K–3000K). Soft warm light gently spilling onto nearby snow, creating small pools of amber glow. Strong warm–cool color contrast between moonlit snow and interior light.  Subtle snowfall catching both moonlight and warm window light. Light chimney smoke drifting upward, softly illuminated. Delicate sparkle texture on snow crystals under directional moonlight.  Minimal artificial brightness, no overexposure. Calm, intimate, peaceful winter atmosphere. Cinematic low-light realism, high dynamic range, ultra-detailed snow texture, 8K quality.

nodes.title: Autumn lighting
widgets_values: Transform into a vibrant autumn morning scene. Golden sunrise or early morning sunlight casting warm directional light. Clear crisp air with soft atmospheric depth.  Trees filled with rich orange, amber, red, and golden leaves. Sunlight filtering through foliage, creating soft dappled light patterns. Long gentle morning shadows stretching across the ground.  Warm sunlight around 4000K–5000K with golden highlights. Soft natural contrast with bright sunlit areas and gentle shadow falloff. Subtle light haze glowing around backlit leaves.  Fallen leaves scattered across pathways with detailed texture. Slight morning mist illuminated by sunlight beams. Bright but not harsh exposure, balanced natural luminance.  Cheerful, peaceful, nostalgic autumn atmosphere. Cinematic realism, high dynamic range, ultra-detailed foliage textures, 8K quality.

nodes.title: warm key lighting
widgets_values: Cinematic dramatic lighting with strong warm directional key light from one side.
